/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/select_items_from_db_sensors.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libselect_items_from_db_sensors.so -o libselect_items_from_db_sensors.so CMakeFiles/select_items_from_db_sensors.dir/select_items_from_db_sensors_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/select_items_from_db_sensors.dir/select_items_from_db_sensors.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/libxml/db_sensor_query:/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/base/msg_logger:" /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 ../../libxml/db_sensor_query/libdb_sensor_query.so ../../base/msg_logger/libmsg_logger.so /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
